description: Inject an emergency vehicle into the Bologna Pasubio simulation and extract its performance metrics. The vehicle 'amb_1' must be of type 'rescue' (vClass 'emergency', guiShape 'emergency', speedFactor '1.5', and 'has.bluelight.device' parameter set to true) and depart at time 300 on a route of at least 5 edges selected from /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio.rou.xml. Use /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/ambulance.rou.xml for the vehicle definition and /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_emergency.sumocfg for the simulation configuration, ensuring tripinfo is saved to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos.xml. Generate a JSON report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ambulance_report.json containing the 'duration', 'routeLength', and 'timeLoss' values for 'amb_1' extracted from the simulation results.
